subcodes.first_line: O thou who holdest fast unto the Covenant of God and His Testament! Praise be unto God that from the hand of the Celestial Cupbearer thou hast drunk from a chalice mingled with camphor [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من تمسک بعهد الله و میثاقه حمد خدا را که از دست ساقی ظهور کاس مزاجها کافور
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @firmness in the Covenant, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
